_description: WCAG 2.1 Level AA criteria checked by AccessibilityBot. Upload this file as RAG context so the bot cites criteria accurately.

criteria.name: Non-text Content
criteria.what_bot_checks: Icons and images that lack a visible text label or accessible name.
criteria.pass_condition: Every non-decorative icon or image has a visible text label or alt text.
criteria.fail_example: A magnifying glass icon with no label beside it.
criteria.fix_example: Add a visible 'Search' label next to the icon.

criteria.name: Info and Relationships
criteria.what_bot_checks: Input fields that lack a programmatically associated or visible label.
criteria.pass_condition: Every form input has a visible label directly above or beside it.
criteria.fail_example: A text field showing only placeholder text 'Enter email' with no label.
criteria.fix_example: Add a visible 'Email' label above the input field.

criteria.name: Contrast (Minimum)
criteria.what_bot_checks: Color contrast ratio between text and its background.
criteria.fail_example: Light gray text #CCCCCC on white background #FFFFFF — ratio ≈ 1.6:1.
criteria.fix_example: Change text to #767676 for exactly 4.48:1, or #595959 for 7:1.

criteria.name: Resize Text
criteria.what_bot_checks: Text that appears smaller than 12px, indicating it would be unreadable at standard zoom.
criteria.pass_condition: All body text is at least 12px (≈9pt).
criteria.fail_example: Footer disclaimer text appearing at approximately 10px.

criteria.name: Target Size
criteria.level_note: WCAG 2.1 AAA, but treated as AA best practice for mobile UIs. WCAG 2.2 promotes this to AA.
criteria.what_bot_checks: Buttons and interactive elements that appear smaller than 44×44px.
criteria.pass_condition: All interactive touch targets are at least 44×44px.
criteria.fail_example: A small 'X' close button that appears to be approximately 20×20px.
criteria.fix_example: Expand the tap area to at least 44×44px even if the icon stays small.

criteria.name: Name, Role, Value
criteria.what_bot_checks: Interactive UI components that have no visible name or role indicator.
criteria.pass_condition: Buttons, links, and form elements have a clear name visible in the design.
criteria.fail_example: An icon-only button with no tooltip, label, or accessible name.
criteria.fix_example: Add a visible text label or at minimum an aria-label in the design annotation.
